I hold a Ph.D. in Physics from Universidade Federal do Rio Grande do Sul, with research focused on statistical mechanics, phase transitions, and complex systems. My postdoctoral work was carried out at Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais, in collaboration with Prof. Ronald Dickman.

I transitioned into data engineering, working across the full data stack — from ETL pipelines to cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Currently at Cielo as Data Platform Specialist – Data, MLOps and LLMOps.
